**Findings**

No blocking findings.

**Acceptance Criteria**

- `jit init` now emits the editable `[item_kinds]` table in [hierarchy_templates.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/hierarchy_templates.rs:162), including `requirement`, `decision`, `risk`, and `invariant`.
- The `invariant` init entry uses the generalized TOML source descriptor at [hierarchy_templates.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/hierarchy_templates.rs:205).
- The indexing path no longer falls back to baked built-ins: `resolve_item_kinds(None)` returns an empty set at [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1200).
- The old `builtin_default_kinds` and `*_default` constructors/constants are removed; grep only found a stale test function name, not live built-in indexing code.
- This repo’s `.jit/config.toml` carries the complete table plus the dogfood `definition` kind at [.jit/config.toml](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/.jit/config.toml:100).
- Golden and behavioral coverage exists in [init_item_kinds_golden.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/tests/init_item_kinds_golden.rs:89).

**Architecture And Separation**

No boundary violation found. Domain resolution remains pure in [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1200), command orchestration stays in [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:41), and project source reads go through `IssueStore::read_repo_file` at [commands/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/commands/item.rs:214).

**Functional Paradigm**

No blocking style debt found. The new resolution path uses iterator collection for configured maps at [domain/item.rs](/home/vkaskivuo/Projects/just-in-time/.claude/worktrees/agent-fbe0a401/crates/jit/src/domain/item.rs:1225), and command-side loops are at the storage/orchestration boundary.

**Correctness And Invariants**
